eGFR: Impact of bias on confusion matrices based on simulations_discordance

Report generated on: 2025-01-28

Load libraries.

Set main parameters.

parameters <- new.env()
parameters$original_data <- read.csv('data/test_data.csv')
parameters$discordance_data <- 
  read.csv('out/egfr/simulations_discordance/egfr_discordance_test_data_bias.csv')
parameters$identifier <- "id"
parameters$model_outcome <- "mgfr_60"
parameters$model_outcome_class_TRUE <-  "1"
parameters$bootstrap_number_of_samples <- 1000
parameters$bootstrap_confidence_level <- 0.95
parameters$bootstrap_methods <- c("norm", "perc")

Set bootstrap parameters.

parameters$bootstrap_number_of_samples <- 1000
parameters$bootstrap_confidence_level <- 0.95
parameters$bootstrap_methods <- c("norm", "perc")

Set plot parameters.

parameters$histogram_method <- "laboratory"
parameters$histogram_method_label <- "Laboratory"
parameters$histogram_auroc_binwidth <-  0.02
parameters$histogram_auroc_x_range <- c(0.5, 1.0)
parameters$histogram_auroc_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_sensitivity_binwidth <-  0.02
parameters$histogram_sensitivity_x_range <- c(0.0, 1.0)
parameters$histogram_sensitivity_y_range <- c(0, 10)
parameters$histogram_specificity_binwidth <-  0.02
parameters$histogram_specificity_x_range <- c(0.5, 1.0)
parameters$histogram_specificity_y_range <- c(0, 10)

Set directories to save results.

parameters$path_and_name_combined_stats <- 'out/egfr/simulations_confusion_matrix/egfr_confusion_matrix_test_data_bias_combined_stats.csv'
parameters$path_and_name_stats_with_ci <- 'out/egfr/simulations_confusion_matrix/egfr_confusion_matrix_test_data_bias_stats_with_ci.csv'
parameters$path_and_name_stats_without_ci <-
  'out/egfr/simulations_confusion_matrix/egfr_confusion_matrix_test_data_bias_stats_without_ci.csv'
parameters$path_and_name_histogram_auroc <- 
  'out/egfr/simulations_confusion_matrix/egfr_confusion_matrix_test_data_histogram_auroc.rds'
parameters$path_and_name_histogram_sensitivity <- 
  'out/egfr/simulations_confusion_matrix/egfr_confusion_matrix_test_data_histogram_sensitivity.rds'
parameters$path_and_name_histogram_specificity <- 
  'out/egfr/simulations_confusion_matrix/egfr_confusion_matrix_test_data_histogram_specificity.rds'

Calculate confusion matrix derived measures.
